svg.title: Runtime v34.3 — Gesamtarchitektur
svg.desc: Schichtenmodell aus externen Systemen, Main Process mit Single-Writer SEM, Thread Management und Hardware-Adaptern.

g.text: Python 3.14 free-threading, single writer, dict contexts

svg.text: queue_event_send is the central egress, queue_event_state, queue_event_ds, queue_event_pc are ingress fans
SEM applies CONFIG_PATCH and broadcasts CONFIG_PATCH_APPLIED, CONFIG_CHANGED back through the router

g.text: TM owns lifecycle of controller threads and the automation job pool
Modbus TCP, RTU bridges, bus timing gates, scaling profiles
